bezeichnung: Intercultural Competence for a globalized world
lernziele:
The course aims at:

  • Reflecting on the role of culture as an universal human activity in groups, organisations, nations, etc.
  • Learning on Intercultural Competence as an essential competence in a globalized world
  • Developing sensitivity for the cultural influence on your own and other people's values, norms, and habits.
  • Reflecting the dynamics of developing cultural identities
  • understand the psychological dynamics of intercultural situations in various professional fields
  • developing intercultural competence in order to be able to work productively with people from other cultural backgrounds in various professional fields

kurse.bezeichnung: Intercultural Competence for a globalized world
kurse.lernziele:
The course aims at:

  • Reflecting on the role of culture as a group phenomenon
  • Learning on Intercultural Competence as an essential competence in a globalized world
  • Developing sensitivity for the cultural influence on your own and other people's values, norms, and habits.
  • Reflecting cultural identity
  • understand the psychological dynamics of intercultural situations in various professional fields
  • developing intercultural competence in order to be able to work productively with people from other cultural backgrounds
kurse.planinhalt:
• The different lenses of culture
  • Development of intercultural sensitivity
  • Reflection on own and foreign cultural values and norms and their impact on professional cooperation
  • Dynamics of intercultural encounters:
  • Culture and social perception: errors of judgement, stereotypes, prejudice,
  • Communication, negotiation and conflict styles
  • Dynamics of international assignments
  • Migration, Acculturation, Integration
  • Conceptual tools for describing cultures: Cultural dimensions, Cultural standards, Cultural styles
  • Intercultural Leadership
  • Intercultural Teamwork
  • Intercultural Engineering
  • Intercultural Usability Design
  • Intercultural Marketing
